description: fe Chieftain WEEKLY EDITION D M MARKS Publisher Vinita T MAY 28 1903 Let us have drainage Give us sewerage or give ui deth Visitors to vinita should not be compelled to bold their noses while passing along our streets Now let the sanitary committee get busy That stinking alley should be cleaned and deodorized There is to be a delegate single state convention at Shawnee June 24 to consider the advisabilty of calling a constitutional conven tion The separate statehood conven tion at Kufaula this week was a fizzle but the double etsters lay it on tbe floods L The foteign buggy man can sell a 75 vehicle for 115 before tbe local dealer can get a prospective customer to look at bis What do you suppose would be the saving if every man and boy in Vinita ceased using tobacco lor a day And bow many would be worse off for the innovation Secretary Hitchcock during a two weeks sojourn in the two ter ritories saw nothing mors wonder ful tban tbe eigniture of tbe chair man of the Dawes Commission Vinita will raise that railroad bonus but just who will get it is not determined yet Tbe
